manuscript_claim: Internal full-schema multimodal fusion improves over unimodal baselines.
required_wording_constraint: State as internal PTB-XL/PTB-XL+ evidence under frozen splits.
forbidden_overclaim: Do not describe as externally validated multimodal performance.

manuscript_claim: Structured-only internal model is a valid comparator but not the top performer.
forbidden_overclaim: Do not imply structured-only replaces signal data.

manuscript_claim: Fair concat improves over signal-embedding MLP in the full-schema internal setting.
forbidden_overclaim: Do not transfer this claim to external datasets.

manuscript_claim: Gated fusion has no statistically clear discriminative advantage over fair concat.
required_wording_constraint: Frame as a null/negative ablation result.
forbidden_overclaim: Do not claim gated superiority.

manuscript_claim: Temperature scaling and reliability analysis support calibration assessment.
required_wording_constraint: Say temperatures were fitted on validation only.
forbidden_overclaim: Do not claim clinical calibration readiness.

manuscript_claim: Uncertainty triage can identify lower-risk retained subsets internally.
forbidden_overclaim: Do not claim clinical triage deployment.

manuscript_claim: XAI reports provide post-hoc signal and structured explanations.
forbidden_overclaim: Do not claim mechanistic explanation or causal attribution.

manuscript_claim: DCA provides exploratory internal decision-curve evidence.
forbidden_overclaim: Do not claim clinical net benefit validation.

manuscript_claim: CPSC2018 signal-only external validation supports limited signal-level transportability.
forbidden_overclaim: Do not call it multimodal external validation.

manuscript_claim: Chapman-Shaoxing signal-only external validation supports partial signal-level external evaluation.
forbidden_overclaim: Do not include Chapman sinus rhythm as main-analysis NORM.

manuscript_claim: Chapman macro AUROC can be high while AP/F1 are low because prevalence is low and thresholds transfer from PTB-XL validation.
forbidden_overclaim: Do not tune thresholds on Chapman test labels.

manuscript_claim: Stage 14L reduced-schema structured-only performance collapses internally.
forbidden_overclaim: Do not present as final external multimodal result.

manuscript_claim: Stage 14L external reduced-schema coverage is only two records per dataset.
required_wording_constraint: Use as a coverage NO-GO gate.
forbidden_overclaim: Do not compute or imply external multimodal performance from two records.

manuscript_claim: Exact PTB-XL+ 531-column external reconstruction is NO-GO.
required_wording_constraint: Describe as de novo external reconstruction limitation.
forbidden_overclaim: Do not say internal PTB-XL+ released features are invalid.

manuscript_claim: External multimodal validation has been completed.
forbidden_overclaim: No external multimodal result exists.

manuscript_claim: Gated fusion is superior to fair concat.
forbidden_overclaim: Do not make architecture-superiority claim.

manuscript_claim: The framework is clinically ready or clinically validated.
forbidden_overclaim: Do not claim clinical deployment readiness.

manuscript_claim: Exact 531-column PTB-XL+ external reproduction was achieved.
forbidden_overclaim: Do not claim exact external structured feature reproduction.

manuscript_claim: External signal calibration was evaluated without external tuning.
required_wording_constraint: State that temperature scaling was fit on internal validation and only evaluated externally.
forbidden_overclaim: Do not refit calibration on external labels.

manuscript_claim: Figure source-data files are available for internal performance, calibration, uncertainty, and XAI.
forbidden_overclaim: Do not imply external multimodal source data exist.
